## Summary
- What changed?
- Why does it matter to users or operators?

## Validation
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm --prefix backend run build`
- [ ] `npm --prefix backend test`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`

## UX Review
- [ ] I checked empty, loading, success, and error states.
- [ ] I removed or rewrote internal/debug-style copy from the primary UI.
- [ ] I attached screenshots or a short screen capture for UI changes.

## Risk and Rollout
- Risk level:
- Rollback path:
- Follow-up work, if any:
